name: Euclid's Elements Book VI — Propositions 1–11
description: Similar triangles: same height, parallel cuts, equiangular, third proportional. VI.1 is basis. Depends on Book I and Book V.

    Prop9["Prop. VI.9\nCut off prescribed part"]

    Prop11["Prop. VI.11\nThird proportional"]
